TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Chris Hipkins Chris Hipkins (ryax sa 5 na byacing tay 9 squ kawas na 1978 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1978) mrhuw New zealand ta' misuw hya' ga Chris Hipkins, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2023 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Chris Hipkins minkahul sa Wellington na New zealand. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1978 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' ŚźĄŚúčť†ėŚįéšļļŚąóŤ°® canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ńßris~…ē ńßipkins~…ē ¶~ ®ńßris~…ē ńßipkins~…ē (rjax s~…ēa * na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - mis~…ēuw ), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw new zealan* ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ńßris~…ē ńßipkins~…ē, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral ¶~ ®ńßris~…ē ńßipkins~…ē minkańßul s~…ēa welliŇčton na new zealan*. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ******* ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
